'''âr-n-sh-n''' ('''karanshenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monetise|monetise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-n-sh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monetise|monetise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-n-sh-n
|-
! Lemma
| karanshenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiranshenoko|thiranshenoko]] || [[word:jiranshenoko|jiranshenoko]] || [[word:shiranshenoko|shiranshenoko]] || [[word:kiranshenoko|kiranshenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
